name: Secrets Manager
description: Plugin to enable autonomous agents to request and set runtime settings and secrets

ENCRYPTION_SALT.label: Salt
ENCRYPTION_SALT.help: Custom salt for encryption key derivation (optional)

ENABLE_ENCRYPTION.label: Encryption
ENABLE_ENCRYPTION.help: Enable encryption for stored secrets (default: true)

ENABLE_ACCESS_LOGGING.label: Access Logging
ENABLE_ACCESS_LOGGING.help: Enable access logging for audit (default: true)
